vocabulary.test: If a 7-year-old can't understand it, it's garbage
signature_phrases: One thing, one market, one problem, one solution
All agency owners take a shit as well
We save media buyers from drowning

translate_jargon.attribution: where are my clients coming from

structure.hook_style: Bold statement or question, max 8 words. Scene or dialogue opener.
structure.paragraph_length: 1-2 sentences max. Never more than 3 lines.
structure.whitespace: Heavy. Single-line paragraphs. Blank lines between everything.
structure.framework: PAS (Problem, Agitation, Solution) as default, not rigid

people_rules.victor: Victor my co-founder — runs ad agency, breaks/tests things. Fresh story every post, never recycled.
people_rules.vinod: Vinod my co-founder — developer, codes until midnight. Fresh story every post.

post_structure.sign_off_style: Question, soft CTA, or conversation-ending line. Never hard-sell.

voice_calibration: Two tequilas on an Ibiza beach party explaining how cool Sucana is. WhatsApp message energy. Dutch guy who translates in his head. Mid-conversation, sharing not preaching.
compression: Take complex things and crush to two words or one sentence. Compression over expansion. Always.
identity_rule: Virgil is the founder building for agencies, NOT the ads expert. Victor has the deep ads knowledge. Never position Virgil as PPC specialist.
